query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, u.consultorId, u.programId, c.role as consultor_role, c.managedProgramId FROM users u LEFT JOIN consultors c ON u.consultorId = c.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Ana Carolina%' OR u.name LIKE '%Joseane%' ORDER BY u.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, u.consultorId, u.programId, c.role as consultor_role, c.managedProgramId FROM users u LEFT JOIN consultors c ON u.consultorId = c.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Ana Carolina%' OR u.name LIKE '%Joseane%' ORDER BY u.name;
